gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT (radeonsi, navi32, LLVM 16.0.6, DRM 3.57, 6.7.6-zen1-1-zen)
notes: Game crashes with the "Video initialization failed" DX11 error. Using WineD3D instead of Proton allows the program to start... but not in VR mode, which is kind of the entire point of a VR game. Have tried Proton Experimental, Proton Hotfix, Proton Glorious Eggroll, nothing works. Might refund the game.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT (radeonsi, navi32, LLVM 16.0.6, DRM 3.57, 6.7.6-zen1-1-zen)
notes:
The game will not run in VR under Linux. Forcing Steam to use Wine3D instead of Proton allows the game to start, but not in VR mode, which doesn't work for a VR game. No other amount of tweaking will allow the game to start.

Game support staff were actively rude when I asked for help.
Works great on proton 8 (does not work on 9)
